title: Fire in Building 3
description: Simulated demo case: Fire reported in Building 3 with smoke on second floor and people trapped on third floor.

inputs.content: Smoke visible from second floor of Building 3. Strong smell of burning plastic. Two people visible on third floor balcony calling for help. Fire trucks have not yet arrived.

Voice report from field observer: I can see thick grey smoke coming from the second floor windows of Building 3. The fire alarm is not sounding. I count at least two people on the third floor balcony. No emergency vehicles on scene yet.
